code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of Triples about an astronaut (or related entities) into a single
    fluent English sentence.  Handles a variety of predicates by mapping them to
    natural‑language fragments and joins the fragments with commas and a final
    “and”.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Helper functions for specific predicate renderings
    def fmt_date(s: str) -> str:
        # keep original format, optionally strip quotes
        return s.strip('"')

    def fmt_minutes(m: str) -> str:
        # remove surrounding quotes and possible parentheses
        return m.strip('"').replace('(', '').replace(')', '')

    # Mapping predicate -> function(subject, object) -> phrase
    render = {
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {fmt_date(o)}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "birthName": lambda s, o: f"{s} was originally named {o}",
        "deathDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} died on {fmt_date(o)}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
        "nationality": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a citizen of {o}",
        "occupation": lambda s, o: f"{s} worked as a {o}",
        "status": lambda s, o: f"{s} has the status \"{o}\"",
        "timeInSpace": lambda s, o: f"{s} spent {fmt_minutes(o)} minutes in space",
        "mission": lambda s, o: f"{s} flew on {o}",
        "selectedByNasa": lambda s, o: f"{s} was selected by NASA in {o}",
        "dateOfRetirement": lambda s, o: f"{s} retired in {fmt_date(o)}",
        "title": lambda s, o: f"{s} held the title \"{o}\"",
        "servedAsChiefOfTheAstronautOfficeIn": lambda s, o: f"{s} served as chief of the Astronaut Office in {o}",
        "award": lambda s, o: f"{s} received the {o}",
        "ribbonAward": lambda s, o: f"{s} was awarded the {o}",
        "awards": lambda s, o: f"{s} earned {o} awards",
        "operator": lambda s, o: f"{s} was operated by {o}",
        "commander": lambda s, o: f"{s} was commanded by {o}",
        "backupPilot": lambda s, o: f"{s} had backup pilot {o}",
        "crewMembers": lambda s, o: f"{s} included crew member {o}",
        "alternativeName": lambda s, o: f"{s} is also known as {o}",
        # generic fallback
        "default": lambda s, p, o: f"{s} {p} {o}",
    }

    phrases = []
    for t in triples:
        func = render.get(t.predicate)
        if func:
            # predicates with two‑argument lambdas
            try:
                phrase = func(t.subject, t.object)
            except TypeError:
                # fallback to generic
                phrase = render["default"](t.subject, t.predicate, t.object)
        else:
            phrase = render["default"](t.subject, t.predicate, t.object)
        phrases.append(phrase)

    # Join phrases into a single sentence
    if len(phrases) == 1:
        sentence = phrases[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."

    # Capitalize first character
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
